result.title: This Took 2 Minutes And Changes Everything
result.description:
OpenClaw just got WAY easier (and safer) to install.

I was just at NVIDIA GTC 2026 and there were a TON of cutting-edge AI announcements and releases (all the highlights are in my latest YouTube video) but this one stood out the most. 

I watched them fully install OpenClaw on my DGX Spark device in like 2 minutes. It was a 1-line installation with NemoClaw that includes an additional security layer for peace of mind.

This is a near state-of-the-art model running fully on my device without any cloud or API calls needed.

This is going to make the barrier to entry for installing OpenClaw WAY lower.

#ai #nvidia #gtc2026 #ainews #openclaw

result.title: Perplexity “Computer” is Kind of Insane
result.description:
Perplexity is apparently giving people a dedicated Mac Mini to run their AI agents on 24/7.

It's available now on the paid plans, and this video shows just a teaser of all the cool things you can build with it.

What would you build with Perplexity Computer?

result.title: Claude Just Dropped A Huge New Feature
result.description:
Send this to someone who would find it useful!

Claude can now generate interactive charts, timelines, and visualizations from a single prompt.

You can adjust sliders, explore data, and interact with the results.

And yes — you can even use it on the free plan.

But just make sure to fact-check the numbers...

For all the latest AI updates, releases, and news, check out my latest AI news video on YouTube (link in bio).

#ai #ainews #claude #datatools

result.title: This New Feature Is A Big Deal For Creatives
result.description:
This new AI feature from Canva is actually amazing for creatives.

They just launched Magic Layers — and it can take ANY image and automatically break it into editable layers.

So if you have a real or AI generated image, Canva can separate things like the background, objects, people, or individual elements.

Then you can rearrange, resize, or completely recompose the image like it was originally built in layers.

That means you can generate one AI image and then turn it into multiple thumbnails, ads, or designs without starting over.

Honestly, if you make YouTube thumbnails, ads, or social content, this is a feature you’ll want to know about.

#ai #canva #aitools #contentcreation #ainews
